content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Array Elimination". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1602/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n, the size of the array. The next line contains n space-separated integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to eliminate all elements from the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a greedy approach to eliminate the elements from the array. Sort the array and then eliminate the elements one by one.

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    count = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if arr[i] > 0:
            count += 1
            arr[i] = 0
    print(count)
